input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.6.5.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.6.5.1
            TITLE: separation of tractive system and glv system:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.6.5.1: Separation of Tractive System and GLV System:
EV.6.5.1 Separation of Tractive System and GLV System: 
a. The entire Tractive System and GLV System must be completely galvanically separated. 
b. The border between Tractive and GLV System is the galvanic isolation between both 
systems.  Therefore, some components, such as the Motor Controller, may be part of 
both systems.

final_answer: rule EV.6.5.1: Separation of Tractive System and GLV System: EV.6.5.1 Separation of Tractive System and GLV System: a. The entire Tractive System and GLV System must be completely galvanically separated. b. The border between Tractive and GLV System is the galvanic isolation between both systems. Therefore, some components, such as the Motor Controller, may be part of both systems.
